2048.title: 2048 Game | Addictive Number Merge Puzzle
2048.description: Combine identical number blocks strategically to reach the legendary 2048 tile in this highly addictive classic puzzle game. Test your logic, planning, and brainpower as you slide tiles across the grid. A perfect free online 2048 browser game for quick breaks and mental stimulation without any installation.

length.title: Length Converter | Meters, Feet, Inches
length.description: Convert between all length units like meters, feet, inches, centimeters, and miles instantly. An essential, fast, and free online conversion tool that gives precise measurements for construction, DIY projects, and everyday use.

weight.title: Weight Converter | Kilograms, Pounds, Ounces
weight.description: Convert weight and mass between kilograms, pounds, ounces, and grams with high precision. Use this completely free online calculator for cooking recipes, international weight tracking, diets, and gym equipment conversions.

currency.description: Discover current live exchange rates for USD, EUR, JPY, GBP, and more global currencies instantly. A fast, powerful calculator to track market currency fluctuations and find out exactly how much you get to the decimal.

temperature-converter.title: Temperature Converter
temperature-converter.description: Instantly convert between Celsius (°C), Fahrenheit (°F), and Kelvin (K). A fast and highly precise online tool strictly designed for diverse global cooking recipes, science experiments, or checking international weather reports seamlessly.

area-converter.title: Area Converter
area-converter.description: Easily convert various area units including square meters (㎡), acres, hectares, and regional pyeong. A robust and precise free online tool optimized for real estate transactions, gardening, or land measurements anywhere.

speed-converter.description: Instantly convert complicated speed units: km/h, mph, m/s, knots, and Mach without hassle. A precisely-tuned free online tool perfect for international travel, aviation, maritime analysis, driving specs, and advanced physics studies.

regex-tester.title: Professional Regex Tester | Real-time Pattern Validator
regex-tester.description: Validate complex patterns and capture groups with instantaneous visual feedback. Standard JavaScript engine based regex tester with a cheat sheet.

faqs.q: Which specific regex dialect does this tool utilize?
faqs.a: This tool is built strictly upon the standard JavaScript (ECMAScript) regular expression engine, which is the native implementation of your modern web browser.

faqs.q: Are there performance safety limits for complex patterns?
faqs.a: Yes. To explicitly prevent browser freezing or memory overflow from catastrophic backtracking, we cap the total match count at 1,000 per execution.

steps: Insert your logical Regex pattern inside the primary slash-enclosed input box.
Optionally append control flags (like 'g' for global or 'i' for case-insensitive).
Paste the raw sample content you wish to evaluate into the 'Test Subject' area.
Review highlighted purple hits instantly in the interactive results panel beneath.

ascii-art.title: ASCII Art Generator | Text to Visual Art Converter
ascii-art.description: Transform any plain English text into impressive, stylized multi-line ASCII Art font blocks instantly. Perfect for customizing GitHub README headers, terminal command line banners, or creative code comments. Use our free online ASCII creator to add a professional and unique retro-tech aesthetic to your digital projects.

cron-generator.keywords: cron generator, crontab UI, scheduling expression, generate cron, devops tool

faqs.q: What do the special characters (*, /, -) mean in fields?
faqs.a: Asterisk (*) means 'every', slash (/) denotes 'intervals' or 'steps', and hyphen (-) specifies a 'range'. For example, '*/5' in the minute field means execution every 5 minutes.

csv-json.title: CSV ↔ JSON Converter | Two-Way Data Transformation

csv-json.keywords: csv to json, json to csv, data converter, format transformer, dev utils

faqs.a: Yes, you can convert thousands of rows of data within your browser's memory limits. The processing speed will depend on your local device's performance.

faqs.q: Are my password and data stored on the server?
faqs.a: Absolutely not. All encryption and decryption processes occur entirely within your local browser (client-side). No sensitive data is ever sent to or stored on our servers.

image-base64.keywords: image to base64, encode image, base64 string, data uri encoder, dev tool

faqs.q: Does converting to Base64 reduce image size?
faqs.a: No, converting binary image data to a text format actually increases the file size by about 33%. It's recommended primarily for small icons to reduce HTTP requests, not for large photos.

ip-address.title: My IP Address Checker | Public IP & Network Info
ip-address.description: Instantly check your current public IP address, location, and ISP details. No installation needed; get your networking info directly through your browser securely.
ip-address.keywords: my ip address, check ip, public ip, ip lookup, ip location

faqs.q: What is the difference between public and private IP?
faqs.a: A public IP is assigned by your ISP for external internet communication, while a private IP is used within your local network (router) for internal device communication.

faqs.q: How does this website know my IP address?
faqs.a: When your device sends a request to our server, it includes your public IP address in the packet header to receive the data back, which allows us to identify and display it securely.

dream-interpretation.title: Dream Interpretation | Explore Meanings of Your Dreams

Search by keywords to get clear, insightful interpretations of hidden symbols and your current psychological state. Our free online dream dictionary helps you uncover the secrets of your subconscious mind and find deeper meaning in your nightly adventures today.

birth-gen.title: Birthstone & Birth Flower | Discover Your Symbols
birth-gen.description: Discover the precious birthstone and beautiful birth flower that match your unique birthday, and explore the deep meanings and symbolism behind them. A wonderful free online tool for finding inspiration for birthday gifts, personalized jewelry ideas, or simply understanding the botanical and mineral heritage of your birth date. Make every anniversary more meaningful.

name-analysis.title: Name Analysis | Meaning & Fortune of Your Identity
name-analysis.description: Analyze the profound meaning and energy of your name based on its linguistic, historical, and traditional roots (Onomastics). See what kind of fortune and character traits your name might be bringing to your life with our comprehensive and free online analysis tool. Perfect for curious individuals or parents looking for deep insights into name origins and impacts.

personal-color.title: Personal Color Analysis | Best Palette for Your Skin
personal-color.description: Discover the best seasonal colors (Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter) that perfectly match your skin tone, hair color, and unique personality. Our free online personal color analysis provides you with a professional palette and psychological meanings to help you boost your confidence in fashion, makeup, and professional styling every single day.

past-life.title: Past Life Finder | Discover Who You Were Before
past-life.description: Who were you in a previous life? Take this fun, imaginative journey through time to discover your past life's identity, profession, and personality traits. Our creative algorithm analyzes your current preferences and character to generate a fascinating story from history. A perfect free online game to play with friends and share your mysterious past results.

pet-mbti.title: Pet MBTI | Personality Test for Cats & Dogs
pet-mbti.description: Analyze your beloved dog or cat's unique personality using our specialized pet MBTI framework. Better understand your furry companion's behavior, preferences, and social style to build a stronger bond. Is your pet an ENFP 'Inspirational Storyteller' or an ISTJ 'Reliable Guardian'? Find out now with our fun and free online pet assessment tool.

mental-age.title: Mental Age Test | Measure Your Psychological Maturity
mental-age.description: Measure your true mental age based on your attitudes, thoughts, and reactions to various daily scenarios. Are you a 'young soul' or an 'old wise spirit'? Compare your psychological maturity level with your chronological age and gain fun insights into your personality with our highly popular and completely free online mental age assessment today.

brain-structure.title: Brain Structure Analysis | Visualize Your Current Thoughts
brain-structure.description: What is filling your mind right now? Visualize your current interests, hidden worries, and major thoughts with our fun and interactive brain structure analysis tool. Answer a few lifestyle questions to generate a colorful map of your mental priorities and share it with friends to compare your 'brain architecture' in a lighthearted and creative way.

joseon-job.title: Joseon Dynasty Job Test | Find Your Historical Role
joseon-job.description: If you were born in the Joseon Dynasty, what would your profession be? Find your historical career path—from a high-ranking scholar to a brave warrior—based on your modern personality and traits. Experience a fun and educational time travel through this creative identity test and discover your place in ancient Korean society for free today!

if-i-am-god.title: What Kind of God Am I? | Divine Personality Test
if-i-am-god.description: What kind of world would you create and what values would you uphold if you were a god? Explore your divine imagination and deep psychological values through this unique and creative test. Discover your deity style and the mythological archetype that best represents your inner power and philosophy in this fascinating free online simulation.

life-bgm.title: BGM of My Life | Find Your Perfect Personal Soundtrack
life-bgm.description: What professional background music best suits your current life situation and emotional state? Discover your personal soundtrack that perfectly matches your unique vibe, energy, and daily story right now. Our free online analysis tool uses your personality traits to recommend a musical genre and atmosphere that represents your life's current journey.

first-impression-color.title: First Impression Color | Discover Your Aura Online
first-impression-color.description: What vibrant color do people first sense when they meet you for the first time? Discover the unique energy and aura you project to others through this insightful color-based personality test. Gain a better understanding of your social presence and the psychological impact of your first impression with our fun and free online visualization tool.

animal-face.title: Animal Face Test | Which Animal Is Your Lookalike?
animal-face.description: Which animal do you resemble the most based on your unique facial features and artistic vibe? Find your animal-like charm—whether it is an adorable puppy, elegant cat, or a clever fox—using our fun visual analysis test. Perfect for sharing with friends to discover your 'animal archetype' and understanding the specific impressions your face makes.

personal-scent.title: Personal Scent Finder | Discover Your Signature Fragrance
personal-scent.description: Find the professional signature fragrance that perfectly matches your unique vibe, style, and inner personality. Our free online assessment tool recommends the best scent families (Citrus, Woody, Floral, Musk) that represent your true character and help you make a lasting impression on everyone you meet.

ideal-type.title: Ideal Type World Cup | Analyze Your Romantic Preferences
ideal-type.description: Analyze your preferred romantic style and physical ideal through a fun and interactive tournament. Discover the specific character qualities and traits you truly value in a long-term partner with our free online psychological analysis. A perfect way to explore your dating values and share your results with friends.

couple-compatibility.title: Couple Compatibility Test | Analyze Your Romantic Harmony
couple-compatibility.description: How well do you and your partner match? Analyze your unique dating style, communication habits, and overall harmony level to see how to build a stronger, more meaningful relationship with our expert-designed free online compatibility test. Get actionable tips and a detailed score for your romantic journey today.

hidden-talent.title: My Hidden Talent Finder | Discover Your Dormant Potential
hidden-talent.description: Discover the special ability or genius potential you haven't realized yet with our insightful free online talent assessment. Check your dormant strengths in creativity, logic, or leadership and find new ways to express yourself and achieve success in your personal and professional life. Unlock your hidden gifts today!

balance-game.title: Balance Game Online | Tough Choices & Values Test
balance-game.description: A thrilling and fun game where you must choose between two extremely difficult and contrasting options. Test your personal values, see how others voted in real-time, and have a great time with friends and family in this addictive free online challenge. Explore hundreds of hypothetical scenarios that will make you think!

fortune-cookie.title: Free Fortune Cookie | Daily Wisdom & Luck Messages
fortune-cookie.description: Crack open a virtual cookie and receive a short but powerful message of wisdom or a piece of helpful advice to guide your day. Shift your perspective and attract positive energy with our beautifully animated free online fortune cookie experience. A perfect way to find inspiration and a little bit of magic in your daily routine.

color-test.title: Color Sensitivity Test | Measure Your Visual Precision
color-test.description: Test your vision and see if you can distinguish subtle color differences with our professional-grade visual sensitivity test. Measure your color perception level and see how your precision compares to the global average in this challenging and fun free online tool. Perfect for designers, artists, and anyone curious about their eyes.

hearing-test.title: Hearing Age Test | Measure Your Audible Frequency Range
hearing-test.description: Measure your audible frequency range and determine your current physical hearing age with our precise free online hearing test. An essential simple tool to check your ear health, identify potential hearing loss, and understand your sensitivity to various sounds. Use headphones in a quiet environment for the most accurate results.

smile-dating-test.title: Smile Dating Test | What Your Smile Says About Your Love
smile-dating-test.description: What kind of unique 'smile' perfectly represents your romantic personality and dating style? Discover your deepest values and how you express affection through this fun and creative personality test. Get a personalized report and a cute smile profile to share with your partner or friends on social media for free today!

dating-test.title: Dating Personality Quiz | Deep Relationship Style Analysis
dating-test.description: Deeply analyze your romantic tendencies, fundamental values, and relationship style with our comprehensive dating personality quiz. Understand yourself better to build more meaningful, lasting, and healthy connections in your love life. Our free online tool provides expert-level insights into your romantic psyche.

stress-test.title: Stress Level Test | Self-Assessment for Mental Health
stress-test.description: How stressed is your mind and body right now? Answer a few well-researched questions to measure your stress index and receive helpful practical tips for mental relaxation and burnout prevention. A necessary free online tool for anyone looking to maintain a healthy emotional balance in their busy daily life.

brain-type.title: Left/Right Brain Test
brain-type.description: Are you more left-brained or right-brained? Discover which hemisphere of your brain is more dominant and how it affects your thinking style.

eq-test.title: Emotional Quotient (EQ) Test
eq-test.description: Analyze your emotional intelligence (EQ), including empathy, self-awareness, and social skills. Understand your emotional strengths and weaknesses.

smartphone-addiction.title: Smartphone Addiction Test | Digital Dependency Indicator
smartphone-addiction.description: Measure your precise level of smartphone dependency and digital habits with our objective assessment tool. Get a clear view of your digital usage patterns and receive professional tips for achieving a healthier, more balanced lifestyle in the modern world. Take our free online test to start your journey toward digital wellness.

kkondae-test.title: Kkondae Test | Check Your Stubbornness & Communication
kkondae-test.description: Precisely measure your 'Kkondae' (stubborn or condescending) index based on your daily attitudes, social views, and speech. A fun, anonymous free online test designed to help you check your current communication style and ensure you are being a modern, open-minded colleague or friend. Discover your unique score today!

hogu-test.title: Hogu (Pushover) Test | measure Your 'No-Ability'
hogu-test.description: Do you find it extremely hard to say no even when you want to? Check if your kind nature is being taken advantage of through our fun and insightful pushover (Hogu) index questions. Get a fun final result and tips on how to stand up for yourself more effectively with our free online psychological assessment tool.

debate-test.title: Debate Skills Test | Logic & Persuasion Assessment
debate-test.description: Test your logic, elocution, reasoning abilities, and persuasive power with our comprehensive free online debate skills test. Measure how well you can express your opinions and defend your arguments under pressure. A great tool for students, professionals, and anyone looking to improve their communication and critical thinking.

idol-test.title: Idol Position Finder | Which K-pop Role Fits You?
idol-test.description: What position would you have if you debuted in a world-famous idol group? Find your perfect role—from charismatic lead vocal to main dancer—based on your unique personality, aura, and traits. Our free online K-pop idol position test analyzes your star power and recommends the best fit for your potential stage career.

resilience-test.title: Resilience Test | Measure Your Emotional Durability
resilience-test.description: Measure your inner strength to overcome difficult challenges and bounce back from daily stress with our expert resilience test. Check your psychological durability and emotional intelligence levels and get actionable feedback on how to build a stronger, more resilient mind for the future. Free, fast, and insightful.

initial-sound-quiz.title: Initial Sound Quiz | Vocabulary & Quick Thinking Game
initial-sound-quiz.description: Challenge your vocabulary and cognitive agility by guessing the correct words based on given initial consonants in this addictive brain game. A fun, interactive free online training tool designed to improve your language skills, memory, and mental speed. Solve puzzles across various categories and aim for the top score!

food-quiz.title: Global Food & Restaurant Quiz | Test Your Gourmet IQ
food-quiz.description: Guess the names of various global dishes and famous restaurants based on high-quality images or creative hints. A great chance to test if you are a true foodie or gourmet expert in this fun and educational free online quiz. Expand your culinary knowledge and challenge your friends to see who knows more about world cuisine!

association-quiz.title: Association Quiz | Word Connection Deduction Puzzle
association-quiz.description: A high-level logical deduction quiz where you must guess the hidden common answer that perfectly connects several distinct hint words. Unleash your imagination, vocabulary, and reasoning power to solve complex linguistic puzzles in our addictive and free online association game. Master the art of lateral thinking today!

spelling-quiz.title: Korean Spelling Test | Grammar & Orthography Challenge
spelling-quiz.description: Test your Korean spelling skills and orthography knowledge with common mistakes like '되/돼', '낫/낳', and '금새/금세'. A fun, high-quality, and free online way to improve your Korean grammar and linguistic precision. Get detailed explanations for every answer to enhance your learning experience and master the language.

faqs.q: What kind of questions are in the quiz?
faqs.a: Commonly confused Korean spellings like '되/돼', '낫/낳', and '금새/금세' that even native speakers often get wrong.
Yes, after each answer, a clear explanation based on standard Korean grammar rules is shown.
Anyone who wants to improve their Korean writing skills or test their language proficiency in a fun way.

steps: Read the sentence and choose the correct word for the bracketed space.
Check the feedback and read the explanation for each question.
Complete all 10 questions to see your final rank and score.
Review your mistakes and share your results with friends!

vocabulary-test.title: Vocabulary Test | Measure Your Word Knowledge Level
vocabulary-test.description: Test your vocabulary level and linguistic breadth from common everyday words to advanced professional terminology with our precise assessment. Check your rank and see how your word power compares to other native and non-native speakers in our fun and free online vocabulary challenge. Perfect for students and writers.

simple-math.title: Mental Arithmetic Quiz | Fast Math Brain Training
simple-math.description: Activate your brain and improve your numerical processing speed with our fast-paced mental arithmetic quiz. Solve various addition, subtraction, division, and multiplication problems as quickly as possible to achieve the highest score. A perfect free online tool for students and anyone looking to sharpen their math skills.

unit.title: Unit Converter Collection
unit.description: Convert all units in one place, including length, weight, currency, temperature, and area. We provide real-time exchange rates and accurate formulas.

finance.title: Finance & Life Calculator Collection
finance.description: Use essential financial calculators for loan interest, salary net pay, severance, and minimum wage. Reflecting legal formulas and latest data.

text.title: Text Conversion & Analysis Tools
text.description: Useful tools for text editing like word counting, case conversion, and Unicode transformation. Simply copy and paste to process text effortlessly.

dev.title: Essential Developer Online Tools
dev.description: Boost productivity with JSON formatters, Base64 encoders, hash generators, and URL encoders, all in your browser without any installation.

utility.title: Convenient Life Utility Tools
utility.description: A collection of various utility tools to solve daily hassles, such as QR code generation, barcode creation, password generators, and world clocks.

health.title: Health & Body Index Calculators
health.description: Professional health index calculators to check your status, including BMI (Obesity), BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate), and Biorhythms.

games.title: Mini Game Collection
games.description: Play addictive mini-games like Suika Game, 2048, Sudoku, and Snake directly in your browser without any installation required.

fun.title: Fortune Telling & Psychology Tests
fun.description: From traditional Saju and MBTI tests to daily horoscopes and Tarot cards! Enjoy a variety of content to explore your fortune and psychology.

trivia.title: Trivia & Common Sense Quizzes
trivia.description: A collection of quizzes to build your knowledge while having fun, including initial sound quizzes and general common sense questions.

category.whyUse: Why use {name} tools on Tool Hive?
category.whyUseDesc: Tool Hive {name} tools run instantly in your web browser without complex installations or annoying ads. Your valuable data is not stored on servers, but processed entirely within your browser for complete privacy and security.
